chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Acq. Appeal No.S-21 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. For hearing of main case 24-10-2024 Mr. Muhammad Ali Dayo, Advocate for respondents. Mr. Z.A. Jatoi, Additional P.G. **** On 16.10.2024, following order was passed: “None present for the appellant nor any intimation is received. Record reflects that on 01.04.2024, appellant was present and he sought time to bring his counsel. Thereafter, on 29.04.2024, counsel for appellant sought time for preparation, but today he is called absent. Under such circumstances, this appeal is required to be dismissed for non-prosecution; however, in the interest of justice, adjourned to 24.10.2024, for which intimation notice be issued to appellant’s counsel”. Today, neither appellant nor his counsel is in attendance, which reflects that the appellant has lost interest in this matter. Under such circumstances, this Crl. Acq. Appeal is dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE Ahmad
